scriptDesc: Install WhatsApp Desktop via Chocolatey (skips Microsoft Store entirely)

messages.checking: Checking for existing WhatsApp Desktop install...
messages.notFound: WhatsApp Desktop not found -- will install via Chocolatey
messages.verifyFailed: Install completed but WhatsApp.exe was not found in any expected location -- choco package may have changed install path
messages.fallbackTriggered: Chocolatey path failed -- falling back to official WhatsApp installer ({reason})
messages.fallbackDisabled: Fallback disabled in config -- aborting after Chocolatey failure
messages.fallbackInstallerExited: Official installer exited with code {code} after {seconds}s
messages.fallbackVerifyFailed: Official installer ran but WhatsApp.exe still not found in expected locations
messages.fallbackSuccess: WhatsApp installed via official installer at: {path}
messages.uninstallFailed: {name} uninstall failed -- package may need manual removal.
messages.cleanupSkipped: Post-uninstall cleanup disabled in config -- skipping registry + shortcut sweep
messages.cleanupStart: Sweeping leftover WhatsApp registry keys + shortcuts...
messages.cleanupSummary: Cleanup summary -- registry: {regRemoved} removed / {regMissing} clean / {regFailed} failed; shortcuts: {scRemoved} removed / {scMissing} clean / {scFailed} failed
messages.uninstallComplete: Uninstall complete. Package removed, tracking purged.
